hints.HELIUM: Lightest noble gas, fills party balloons
hints.NEON: Noble gas that glows in signs
hints.ARGON: Most abundant noble gas in Earth's atmosphere
hints.KRYPTON: Noble gas; also Superman's home planet
hints.FLUORINE: Most reactive nonmetal, found in toothpaste
hints.BROMINE: Halogen that's a deep red liquid at room temperature
hints.IODINE: Halogen used in disinfectants and thyroid hormones
hints.LITHIUM: Soft metal used in rechargeable batteries
hints.SODIUM: Alkali metal that combines with chloride to make salt
hints.GALLIUM: Metal that melts in your hand
hints.POLONIUM: Highly radioactive element discovered by Marie Curie
